novel_features.name: Model advisor
novel_features.description: Picks the right Ollama Cloud model for a prompt by combining live catalog, heuristic prompt-feature extraction, curated cost/latency metadata, and an optional cheap meta-LLM tiebreak.
novel_features.rationale: Requires correlating live catalog state with prompt features, session context, budget, and curated per-model metadata that no other tool exposes in a single decision.
novel_features.why_it_matters: When an agent needs to pick a hosted Ollama model and the default routing is wrong, reach for advise instead of hardcoding the model name.

novel_features.name: Side-by-side comparison
novel_features.description: Runs the same prompt against N hosted models in parallel and emits side-by-side response, tokens, latency, and cost.
novel_features.rationale: Requires the same portable per-model metadata that powers the advisor, plus parallel chat dispatch with cost+latency tracking.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use when calibrating advisor recommendations or picking between two close models.

novel_features.name: Advisor explain
novel_features.description: With --explain, advise emits the full scoring trace: feature extraction, per-model scores, filter passes, tiebreak rationale.
novel_features.rationale: Only possible because advise is heuristic-first and auditable; an LLM-only router can't show its work.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this when an advise recommendation surprises you and you want to understand why.

novel_features.name: Advisor replay
novel_features.description: Replays advisor recommendations against a judge LLM scoring whether the picked model handled the prompt better than alternatives. Powers the divergence canary.
novel_features.rationale: Requires the advisor log (we own) plus catalog metadata (we own); no other tool persists both.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Run weekly to detect advisor drift; surfaces divergence between recommended and actual-chosen models.

novel_features.name: Budget probe
novel_features.description: Probes the free-tier weekly cap with a 1-token chat. Parses Ollama Cloud's 429 prose and emits a structured verdict (ok | exhausted | unknown) with the upgrade URL so agents can pre-flight quota before launching long sessions.
novel_features.rationale: Requires recognising Ollama Cloud's specific 429 envelope ("you have reached your weekly usage limit") whether it surfaces as HTTP status 429 or post-retry error prose.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Run before launching a long agent session to confirm quota is available.

novel_features.name: Cost trace
novel_features.description: Aggregates advisor-log cost estimates over a time window; compares per-model and per-task-hint spend.
novel_features.rationale: Requires the advisor log (we own) plus portable cost metadata; no other tool persists both.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use to decide whether to upgrade to a paid Ollama Cloud tier.

narrative.headline: Routes every prompt to the right hosted Ollama model. Wraps chat, embeddings, catalog, and the OpenAI-compatible mirror — and ships an advise verb that picks a model by prompt features, session context, budget, and latency.
narrative.value_prop: Ollama Cloud's catalog spans 20+ open-weights models (Qwen3, GPT-OSS, DeepSeek-V3, Kimi-K2, GLM, Llama, Gemma) and growing. No built-in picker exists. This CLI is the only one that combines live catalog metadata with prompt-feature extraction and emits a why/alternatives envelope you can pipe into other agents.
narrative.auth_narrative: Bearer auth via OLLAMA_CLOUD_API_KEY (intentionally distinct from any local-Ollama env var). Free tier is rate-limited weekly; the budget command surfaces exhaustion before workflows fail.

quickstart.comment: Inspect drift between live catalog and curated metadata overlay
Pick a model for a specific prompt; pass any file path (or - for stdin)
Probe free-tier quota before launching long sessions

troubleshoots.symptom: HTTP 429 with 'you have reached your weekly usage limit'
troubleshoots.fix: Free tier exhausted. Run `ollama-cloud-pp-cli budget --json` to confirm; pick a non-rate-limited model with `advise --exclude <exhausted-models>`; or upgrade at https://ollama.com/upgrade
Run `advise --explain --format md` to see the scoring trace. Adjust --task-hint, --exclude, or the curated models.json overlay.
Confirm OLLAMA_CLOUD_API_KEY is set; the CLI does NOT read OLLAMA_API_KEY (intentional, to avoid local-daemon collisions)

troubleshoots.symptom: advise picks a model not in /api/tags
troubleshoots.fix: Catalog snapshot is stale. Run `tags --no-cache` to repopulate the local SQLite snapshot.

narrative.when_to_use: Pick this CLI when you need agent-driven access to Ollama's hosted catalog and want routing intelligence baked in. Especially useful when the alternative is hardcoding a model name and hoping it stays right. Pairs naturally with multi-backend setups where ollama-cloud is one of several providers.

recipes.title: Advise with explain trace as markdown
recipes.explanation: --explain populates the feature trace and filtered-candidate audit; --format md renders for humans.

recipes.title: Detect catalog drift
recipes.explanation: Diffs live /api/tags against curated models.json overlay; flags both uncurated live models and stale curated patterns.

recipes.title: Replay last week recommendations
recipes.explanation: Engagement canary; dotted-path select keeps response under context budget.

recipes.title: Side-by-side comparison
recipes.explanation: Runs the prompt against both models in parallel and reports per-model latency, tokens, and rate-limit state.

recipes.title: Cost rollup by task hint
recipes.explanation: Aggregates the advisor JSONL log by task-hint so you can decide whether to upgrade the Ollama Cloud tier.

trigger_phrases: which ollama cloud model should I use
